name: Streaming Plan Recovery
task: Detect when the user's observed trajectory is diverging from their intended plan, and produce a timely intervention that helps them recover.

records.title: POV : Real Kitchen Pressure | Omelettes, Wraps & Rush Hour 🔥

verifier.goal: Prepare the "12 Egg Scramble Bacon Hash Brown" order.
verifier.current_state: User has completed preparing a salad and placed it on the counter, and has not yet prepared the eggs for the "12 Egg Scramble" order.
verifier.expected_next_state: User should have prepared the eggs for the "12 Egg Scramble" order earlier, for example, after placing the hash browns on the griddle.
verifier.visual_evidence: The receipt at 0:09 shows "12 Egg Scramble Bacon Hash Brown". At 2:09, the user explicitly says "Where my egg? Where are my eggs, guys?", indicating they realized they had omitted preparing the eggs for the scramble.
verifier.intervention_timing: While the user is preparing the salad (e.g., around 1:00-1:50), or immediately after they finish the salad and before they realize the mistake.
verifier.assistant_response: Remember to prepare the eggs for the scramble.

curation.visual_evidence: The receipt at 0:09 shows "12 Egg Scramble Bacon Hash Brown". At 2:09, the user explicitly says "Where my egg? Where are my eggs, guys?", indicating they realized they had omitted preparing the eggs for the scramble.
curation.notes: Auto-collected from channel feed; VLM must verify.

annotation.goal: Prepare the "12 Egg Scramble Bacon Hash Brown" order.
annotation.current_state: User has completed preparing a salad and placed it on the counter, and has not yet prepared the eggs for the "12 Egg Scramble" order.
annotation.expected_next_state: User should have prepared the eggs for the "12 Egg Scramble" order earlier, for example, after placing the hash browns on the griddle.
annotation.intervention_timing: While the user is preparing the salad (e.g., around 1:00-1:50), or immediately after they finish the salad and before they realize the mistake.
annotation.assistant_response: Remember to prepare the eggs for the scramble.

records.title: POV : The Breakfast Rush Never Stopped 😳🍳

verifier.goal: Prepare an English Muffin Sausage, Egg, and Cheese Sandwich, French Fries, and Pancakes.
verifier.current_state: The user has picked up wheat bread and is about to toast it.
verifier.expected_next_state: The user should be toasting an English muffin for the sandwich.
verifier.visual_evidence: The receipt at 0:31 and 2:22 specifies an 'ENGLISH MUFFIN SAUSAGE, EGG AND CHEESE SANDWICH'. At 2:33, the user takes out wheat bread from a bag, and at 2:40, places it into the toaster.
verifier.assistant_response: The order is for an English muffin sandwich. Please use an English muffin instead of toast.

curation.visual_evidence: The receipt at 0:31 and 2:22 specifies an 'ENGLISH MUFFIN SAUSAGE, EGG AND CHEESE SANDWICH'. At 2:33, the user takes out wheat bread from a bag, and at 2:40, places it into the toaster.
curation.notes: Auto-collected from channel feed; VLM must verify.

annotation.goal: Prepare an English Muffin Sausage, Egg, and Cheese Sandwich, French Fries, and Pancakes.
annotation.current_state: The user has picked up wheat bread and is about to toast it.
annotation.expected_next_state: The user should be toasting an English muffin for the sandwich.
annotation.assistant_response: The order is for an English muffin sandwich. Please use an English muffin instead of toast.

records.title: POV : 👉 Busy Grill Shift with Kebabs & Omelettes 🔥

verifier.goal: Fulfill the order: "Bacon Cheese Omelette, Mozzarella, Cheddar, Chili, with Toast".
verifier.current_state: The user is slicing raw potatoes.
verifier.expected_next_state: The user should be preparing toast or adding cheese/chili to the omelettes.
verifier.visual_evidence: The user picks up a raw potato, slices it, and places the slices into a deep fryer basket. The order ticket visible at 1:05 does not list potatoes.
verifier.intervention_timing: Immediately after the user picks up the potato or starts slicing it.
verifier.assistant_response: The order is for a Bacon Cheese Omelette with Toast. Potatoes are not on this order.

curation.visual_evidence: The user picks up a raw potato, slices it, and places the slices into a deep fryer basket. The order ticket visible at 1:05 does not list potatoes.
curation.notes: Auto-collected from channel feed; VLM must verify.

annotation.goal: Fulfill the order: "Bacon Cheese Omelette, Mozzarella, Cheddar, Chili, with Toast".
annotation.current_state: The user is slicing raw potatoes.
annotation.expected_next_state: The user should be preparing toast or adding cheese/chili to the omelettes.
annotation.intervention_timing: Immediately after the user picks up the potato or starts slicing it.
annotation.assistant_response: The order is for a Bacon Cheese Omelette with Toast. Potatoes are not on this order.

records.title: POV : 👉 Steady Grill Shift with Wraps, Kebabs & Omelettes 🔥

verifier.goal: Prepare a scrambled egg dish with American cheese as per the order ticket.
verifier.current_state: The user is preparing various ingredients on the griddle and in pans, including pouring scrambled eggs onto the griddle.
verifier.expected_next_state: The user should continue preparing the scrambled eggs and other components for the scrambled egg dish, and eventually add American cheese, without preparing fried eggs.
verifier.visual_evidence: The order ticket shown at 0:18-0:21 clearly states 'SCRAMBLE ADD AMERICAN'. At 2:37, the user cracks two whole eggs into a pan and begins cooking them as fried eggs, which is a different preparation than scrambled eggs.
verifier.intervention_timing: Immediately after the user cracks the first egg into the pan for frying.
verifier.assistant_response: The order ticket specifies scrambled eggs. Are you making fried eggs for a different order?

curation.visual_evidence: The order ticket shown at 0:18-0:21 clearly states 'SCRAMBLE ADD AMERICAN'. At 2:37, the user cracks two whole eggs into a pan and begins cooking them as fried eggs, which is a different preparation than scrambled eggs.
curation.notes: Auto-collected from channel feed; VLM must verify.

annotation.goal: Prepare a scrambled egg dish with American cheese as per the order ticket.
annotation.current_state: The user is preparing various ingredients on the griddle and in pans, including pouring scrambled eggs onto the griddle.
annotation.expected_next_state: The user should continue preparing the scrambled eggs and other components for the scrambled egg dish, and eventually add American cheese, without preparing fried eggs.
annotation.intervention_timing: Immediately after the user cracks the first egg into the pan for frying.
annotation.assistant_response: The order ticket specifies scrambled eggs. Are you making fried eggs for a different order?

records.title: POV : Started calm… then 16 coney orders came in nonstop

verifier.goal: Prepare multiple food orders, including grilling hot dogs.
verifier.current_state: Hot dogs are on the grill, cooking, but have been left unattended for an extended period.
verifier.expected_next_state: Hot dogs are being monitored and turned on the grill, or removed if cooked.
verifier.visual_evidence: Hot dogs are placed on the grill at 1:24, the user walks away at 1:25, and the hot dogs are visibly untouched on the grill until the user returns to turn them at 3:50.
verifier.intervention_timing: Proactive, after a short period of unattended cooking.
verifier.assistant_response: Remind the user about the hot dogs on the grill.

curation.visual_evidence: Hot dogs are placed on the grill at 1:24, the user walks away at 1:25, and the hot dogs are visibly untouched on the grill until the user returns to turn them at 3:50.
curation.notes: Auto-collected from channel feed; VLM must verify.

annotation.goal: Prepare multiple food orders, including grilling hot dogs.
annotation.current_state: Hot dogs are on the grill, cooking, but have been left unattended for an extended period.
annotation.expected_next_state: Hot dogs are being monitored and turned on the grill, or removed if cooked.
annotation.intervention_timing: Proactive, after a short period of unattended cooking.
annotation.assistant_response: Remind the user about the hot dogs on the grill.

records.title: POV : 👉 Grill Didn’t Stop… My Friend Had to Jump In 😳🔥

verifier.goal: Prepare the omelet according to the order ticket.
verifier.current_state: The user is preparing an omelet, having already added cheese and green peppers to the egg mixture.
verifier.expected_next_state: The user should proceed with cooking the omelet without adding ham, as specified by the order ticket.
verifier.visual_evidence: The order ticket visible at 0:18 clearly states 'NO HAM'. At 0:47, the user adds diced ham to the omelet mixture.
verifier.assistant_response: The order ticket specifies 'NO HAM' for this omelet.

curation.visual_evidence: The order ticket visible at 0:18 clearly states 'NO HAM'. At 0:47, the user adds diced ham to the omelet mixture.
curation.notes: Auto-collected from channel feed; VLM must verify.

annotation.goal: Prepare the omelet according to the order ticket.
annotation.current_state: The user is preparing an omelet, having already added cheese and green peppers to the egg mixture.
annotation.expected_next_state: The user should proceed with cooking the omelet without adding ham, as specified by the order ticket.
annotation.assistant_response: The order ticket specifies 'NO HAM' for this omelet.

records.title: POV : Cooking Turned Into Nonstop Orders 😅🔥

verifier.current_state: The chef has cracked one egg into a pan, which is intended for cooking over easy, but then lifts the pan and pours the egg into a large bucket of egg mixture.
verifier.expected_next_state: The chef should continue cooking the egg in the pan to prepare it over easy.
verifier.visual_evidence: At 1:22, the chef lifts the pan containing a cracked egg and pours its contents into a large bucket of egg mixture, instead of cooking it on the stove.
verifier.intervention_timing: Immediately after the chef starts pouring the egg into the bucket.
verifier.assistant_response: It looks like you're making over easy eggs. Remember to cook them in the pan.

curation.visual_evidence: At 1:22, the chef lifts the pan containing a cracked egg and pours its contents into a large bucket of egg mixture, instead of cooking it on the stove.
curation.notes: Auto-collected from channel feed; VLM must verify.

annotation.current_state: The chef has cracked one egg into a pan, which is intended for cooking over easy, but then lifts the pan and pours the egg into a large bucket of egg mixture.
annotation.expected_next_state: The chef should continue cooking the egg in the pan to prepare it over easy.
annotation.intervention_timing: Immediately after the chef starts pouring the egg into the bucket.
annotation.assistant_response: It looks like you're making over easy eggs. Remember to cook them in the pan.

records.title: POV: Foodtruck Cooking | Day in My Life at 26 🍔🍟

verifier.goal: Prepare food for customers in a food truck.
verifier.current_state: The user has just turned on the deep fryers and is preparing for the next food handling task, which requires gloves.
verifier.expected_next_state: The user puts on gloves and proceeds with food preparation.
verifier.visual_evidence: The user puts on a pair of gloves, immediately takes them off, and then puts on another pair of gloves.
verifier.intervention_timing: Immediately after the user takes off the first pair of gloves (around 2:29).
verifier.assistant_response: It looks like you took off your gloves. Do you need a different pair?

curation.visual_evidence: The user puts on a pair of gloves, immediately takes them off, and then puts on another pair of gloves.
curation.notes: Auto-collected from channel feed; VLM must verify.

annotation.goal: Prepare food for customers in a food truck.
annotation.current_state: The user has just turned on the deep fryers and is preparing for the next food handling task, which requires gloves.
annotation.expected_next_state: The user puts on gloves and proceeds with food preparation.
annotation.intervention_timing: Immediately after the user takes off the first pair of gloves (around 2:29).
annotation.assistant_response: It looks like you took off your gloves. Do you need a different pair?

records.title: POV: BURGER SHOP RUSH HOUR! 🍔🔥 SOLO COOKING 🧑‍🍳 Nonstop Orders & Fries

verifier.goal: Fill the deep fryer with cooking oil.
verifier.current_state: The user has filled one deep fryer with cooking oil and is now holding a second bottle of oil.
verifier.expected_next_state: The user should put away the second bottle of oil or move to another task, as the deep fryer is already full.
verifier.visual_evidence: At 1:00, the user attempts to pour oil from a second bottle into the deep fryer, but the fryer is visibly full, and the user stops pouring.
verifier.intervention_timing: Proactive, as the user is about to pour the second bottle into the already full fryer.
verifier.assistant_response: The deep fryer is already full.

curation.visual_evidence: At 1:00, the user attempts to pour oil from a second bottle into the deep fryer, but the fryer is visibly full, and the user stops pouring.
curation.notes: Auto-collected from channel feed; VLM must verify.

annotation.goal: Fill the deep fryer with cooking oil.
annotation.current_state: The user has filled one deep fryer with cooking oil and is now holding a second bottle of oil.
annotation.expected_next_state: The user should put away the second bottle of oil or move to another task, as the deep fryer is already full.
annotation.intervention_timing: Proactive, as the user is about to pour the second bottle into the already full fryer.
annotation.assistant_response: The deep fryer is already full.
